name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M41112 [Premium Enhanced Version]. Genuine Italian Grade A Rhombus Leather from the authorized factory. Counter-synced chip. Focus on quality, full steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, Grade A high-quality output, fully upgraded again. Photos match the product. Includes full packaging set. Dimensions: 30*21*17CM
